heading: Retirement under special treaty provisions
label: 3681 Retirement under special treaty provisions
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFunctions vested in President by subsec. (a)(1) delegated to Director of Office of Personnel Management and function vested in President by subsec. (c)(1) of this section delegated to Secretary of Defense, see sections 1–105 and 1–403 of Ex. Ord. No. 12215, , 45 F.R. 36043, 36045, set out as a note under .May 27, 1980section 3601 of this title

children.heading: Purchase of retirement equity; individuals entitled to participate
children.label: a Purchase of retirement equity; individuals entitled to participate
A
children.text: meets the requirements of paragraph (2) of this subsection;

children.label: B
children.text: is separated from employment in the Panama Canal Company, the Canal Zone Government, or the Commission by reason of the implementation of any provision of the Panama Canal Treaty of 1977 and related agreements; and

children.label: C
children.text: becomes employed in a position covered by the Social Security System of the Republic of Panama through the transfer of a function or activity to the Republic of Panama from the United States or through a job placement assistance program.

children.label: A
children.text: has been credited with at least 5 years of civilian service under , relating to creditable service for purposes of civil service retirement;section 8332 of title 5

children.label: B
children.text: is not eligible for an immediate retirement annuity under chapter 83 of title 5, relating to civil service retirement, and elects not to receive a deferred annuity under that chapter based on any portion of that service, and

children.label: C
children.text: elects to withdraw from the Civil Service Retirement and Disability Fund the individual’s entire lump-sum credit (as defined in ) and to transfer that amount to the Social Security System of the Republic of Panama pursuant to the special regime referred to in paragraph 3 of Article VIII of the Agreement in Implementation of Article III of the Panama Canal Treaty of 1977.section 8331(8) of title 5

children.heading: Limitation on amount paid to Social Security System of Republic of Panama
children.label: b Limitation on amount paid to Social Security System of Republic of Panama
children.text: The amount paid to the Social Security System of the Republic of Panama with respect to any individual under subsection (a) of this section shall not exceed the individual’s entire lump-sum credit (as so defined).

children.heading: Purchase of nontransferable deferred annuity; employees entitled to participate
children.label: c Purchase of nontransferable deferred annuity; employees entitled to participate
A
children.text: who is not a citizen of the United States;

children.label: B
children.text: who was employed on , and during any period before that date by an agency or instrumentality of the Government of the United States at any permanent duty station in the Republic of Panama (including, with respect to employment before that date, the area then known as the Canal Zone);October 1, 1979

children.label: C
children.text: who, for any period of service with such agency or instrumentality before , at any such permanent duty station was not covered, by reason of that service, by the United States Civil Service Retirement system or any other Federal retirement system providing benefits similar to those retirement benefits provided by the Social Security System of the Republic of Panama; andOctober 1, 1979

children.label: i
children.text: is creditable toward any Federal retirement system as in effect on ;October 1, 1979

children.label: ii
children.text: would have been creditable toward any such retirement system if the retirement system were in effect at the time of the service accrued by the employee; or

children.label: iii
children.text: consists of any combination of service described in clauses (i) and (ii) of this subparagraph.

The retirement annuity referred to in paragraph (1) of this subsection with respect to any employee will cover retroactively, from , all periods of service, described in subparagraph (D) of that paragraph, by that employee at any permanent duty station in the Republic of Panama (including the area known before that date as the Canal Zone) in agencies and instrumentalities of the Government of the United States during which that employee was not covered by the United States Civil Service Retirement System or any other Federal retirement system providing benefits similar to those retirement benefits provided by the Social Security System of the Republic of Panama.October 1, 1979
